chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR. C.P.No. D – 1739 of 2023. 1.For orders on CMA 7486/2023. 2.For orders on o/obj. at flag.A. 3.For orders on CMA 7487/2023. 4.For orders on CMA 7488/2023. 5.For Hearing of main case. - 30.11.2023. Mr. Pervaiz Tariq Tagar, Advocate for petitioner. - 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted. 4&5. The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, impugning an Order dated 01.09.2023, bearing No. CEO/SEPCO/SUK/M(HR)/A-2/C-4589-92, issued by the Respondent No.3, whereby the major penalty of removal from service was imposed upon him. It has been prayed that the aforesaid order be set aside and its operation be suspended pending determination of the Petition. However, a perusal of the petition and its documents annexed therewith reflects that a remedy lies in the matter by way of appeal under Rule 11(d) of the Pakistan WAPDA Employees (E&D) Rules 1978. Furthermore, as it transpires, such Appeal has admittedly been filed by the Petitioner and is pending before the competent authority. That being so, it is apparent that the Petition is misconceived and the same accordingly stands dismissed in limine along with the pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
